name: Dough Shaper
functional_purpose: shape the dough into a calabash-like shape

construction_steps.reason: the circular base will make contact with the dough
the curved, cylindrical extension will help shape the dough

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a small, curved base at the top
construction_steps.reason: the small, curved base will help shape the top of the dough

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a small, flat base at the top
construction_steps.reason: the small, flat base will provide a stable surface for the tool

placement_func:
def placement():
    self.tool = self.scene.add_entity(
        gs.Morph.Mesh(
            filename="assembled_tool.stl",
            pos=(0.0, 0.0, 0.0),
            euler=(0, 0, 0),
            scale=(1, 1, 1),
        )
    )
    self.tool.set_simulation_properties(
        density=1000.0,
        friction=0.5,
        restitution=0.2
    )
